View this page

iwfm.iwfm_read_param_table_ints¶

iwfm.iwfm_read_param_table_ints(file_lines, line_index, lines)[source]¶
iwfm_read_param_table_ints() - Read a table of integer parameters from a file and organize them into lists

and return a numpy array.

Parameters:

  • file_lines (list) – File contents as list of lines

  • line_index (int) – The index of the line to start reading from.

  • lines (int) – The number of lines to read.

Returns:

params – A list of parameters

Return type:

list

Next
iwfm.iwfm_read_precip_vals
Previous
iwfm.iwfm_read_param_table_floats

    • iwfm_read_param_table_ints()
